title: Insane's Survival Extra (aka IguanaTweaks Expanded)
description: Expand Insane's Survival Overhaul with materials, enchantments, forging and more!
body: Extra stuff for Insane's Survival Overhaul Forging, new enchantments, new materials. **For the full experience for which this mod was designed check out Survival Reimagined.** If you have no idea how to progress check advancements. [![](https://www.howtogeek.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/Patreon-2.jpg?height=200p&trim=2,2,2,2)](https://www.patreon.com/insane96mcp) [![](https://vignette.wikia.nocookie.net/wolfquest/images/d/d0/Discord_logo.png/revision/latest/scale-to-width-down/640?cb=20170619082754)](https://discord.gg/mUaszws) A few features * New enchanting table and enchantments: Choose your enchantments! Also packed with Magnetic, Double Jump, enhanced Criticals and much more. * Fletch your arrows: Give an use to the fletching table! * More materials: Durium, Solarium, Keego and more! * Revamped tool making: use a forge to make tools * New tools, early game "shulker boxes", mining charges, and much more! * [Full features list](https://www.insane96.eu/projects/mods/)
